name: HotPuzzle:Video
short_description: HotPuzzle: Video is a video jigsaw puzzle Unlike previous games, HotPuzzle: Video requires you to spell out dynamic videos, which is much more difficult. But they are all the most pure hot beauty videos.
detailed_description:
HotPuzzle: Video is a video jigsaw puzzle

Unlike previous games, HotPuzzle: Video requires you to spell out dynamic videos, which is much more difficult.

But they are all the most pure hot beauty videos.



The game includes:

15 checkpoints
15 Beauty Videos
Three Wonderful Musics




Feel the fun of HotPuzzle: Video
